posts.author: TonyQuist (Tony Quist)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have some exciting news to share with you! Monday will be doing a joint webinar with Polished Geek on Wednesday, December 7, at 11:30 am ET to showcase the HR Solution, entitled “Manage HR Your Way: Designing the Employee Journey with monday․com.”

If anyone is interested in seeing a demo of the entire employee journey, please click the link to register

connect.polishedgeek.com

Webinar: Manage HR Your Way: Designing the Employee Journey with monday․com

Hosted by Polished Geek's CEO & Founder Deb Cinkus, this live demo will show you how to save time, analyze real-time data, and improve your employee experience in one seamless online workspace with monday․com. Our panelists will offer a Q&A...

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml: Nice one guys! Will be joining you.

posts.author: TonyQuist (Tony Quist)
posts.cookedHtml: Wonderful! We’re looking forward to it – see you there!
